Game.Name: Ranma 1-2 - Chounai Gekitou Hen (Japan)
Game.plot: Street Combat is an Action game, developed and published by NCS,which was released in Japan in 1992.Cheat: CodesAt the title screen, highlight 1 Player mode (Vs. CPU) and press Start on both Controller 1 and Controller 2. If done right, the ending will start right away.Cheat: Hidden Characters - Colon and Happy (JP)Go to the title screen and highlight "Vs mode". Press and hold L and R, then press A. This should bring you to a hidden screen, highlight "Who" and choose your character. You will be able to fight as Colon or Happy.Cheat: Hidden Characters - Colon and Happy (JP)During the versus screen, press and hold L and R, then press left or right to switch to any character except Colon and Happy in the game.Cheat: Free 50 credits (JP)Go to the option menu, highlight "credit" and press select for 10 times. The values of the credit will become 50.
